free_text: Recent experiments at Gammasphere intended to the
Tabs.2-5==Tabs.3-6 and Fig.2==Figs.3-5 in the main ref.
Experiment performed using Gammasphere at LBNL and ANL
The sources were prepared from 252 Cf specimen deposite
in a 5-mm spot on Ti foils. The foil thickness was
1.8 mu-m and 2.0 mu-m. In LBNL experiment, the source
was additionally covered by gold foils on both sides
Gamma rays were detected using 4Pi gamma
detector consisting of XXX HPGe detectors in BGO
anticompton shielding. Gammasphere was set to record
gamma rays with energy between 80 keV and 5.4 MeV.
The gamma-ray detection efficiency varied from a
maximum value of 17% to 4.6% at 3368 keV.
Double sided Si strip detectors were used to
Eight resp. six E-dE telescopes were
used to detect light charged particles produced
and gamma ray detectors was required to identify
